steps.title: Track the units
steps.content: The equation is $6x+21y=3{,}918$. The term $6x$ represents trees in the $6$-hectare community garden.

steps.title: Interpret the variable
steps.content: For $6x$ to be a number of trees, $x$ must be trees per hectare. Since $6$ is the community garden's area, $x$ is the average number of trees per hectare in the community garden. The answer is A.
